settings.text: Everything a growing business needs, under one roof.
Tax, bookkeeping, advisory, audit-prep, payroll, and entity work — handled by the same firm, by the same people, year after year. Pick the pieces you need now; the rest are here when you do.

settings.title: Tax preparation & filing
settings.description: Federal, state, and multi-state returns for individuals, partnerships, S-corps, and C-corps. Quarterly estimates, extensions, amended returns, and IRS correspondence handled in-house.

settings.title: Bookkeeping & monthly close
settings.description: Reconciled by the 10th, financials reviewed by a CPA, and categorized so they hold up under scrutiny. QuickBooks Online or Xero, whichever fits your workflow.

settings.title: Payroll & contractor compliance
settings.description: Full-service payroll, W-2 filings, 1099 issuance, and multi-state withholding. We handle the deadlines; you handle the hiring.

settings.title: Advisory & forecasting
settings.description: Quarterly strategy sessions, cash-flow modeling, scenario planning, and year-end tax planning. The work that turns a backward-looking ledger into forward-looking decisions.

settings.title: Audit & assurance support
settings.description: Independent audit preparation, reviewed financial statements, and representation for IRS examinations, lender reviews, and grant audits.

settings.title: Entity formation & restructuring
settings.description: LLC vs. S-corp analysis, entity conversions, operating agreements coordinated with counsel, and tax-efficient ownership structures for new and growing businesses.

settings.title: Three ways to work with us.
settings.description: Every engagement is a flat fee agreed on in the engagement letter. No hourly billing for scoped work.

settings.title: Seasonal
settings.features:
+ Annual tax preparation & filing
+ Federal, state, and one additional state
+ Quarterly estimated payment calcs
+ IRS notice handling
+ Email access year-round

settings.title: Monthly
settings.features:
+ Everything in Seasonal
+ Monthly bookkeeping & reconciliation
+ Financial statements reviewed by a CPA
+ Payroll administration (up to 10 employees)
+ Scheduled check-ins twice a year

settings.title: Full advisory
settings.features:
+ Everything in Monthly
+ Quarterly strategy & forecasting meetings
+ Cash-flow modeling & scenario planning
+ Proactive year-end tax planning
+ Priority response & unlimited calls

settings.title: From call to first close
settings.text:
Most clients are fully onboarded within two to three weeks of signing the engagement letter.

For tax-only engagements, we can turn around a return in as little as five business days during the off-season.

settings.question: How quickly can we start?
settings.answer: Engagement letters are typically signed within two business days of a discovery call. Onboarding starts the next week and usually completes within two to three weeks for monthly clients, same-week for tax-only returns.

settings.question: What does onboarding look like?
settings.answer: We request prior-year returns, access to your accounting software, and a list of the accounts and payroll systems currently in play. From there we reconcile, categorize, and bring books current — you mostly approve a few connections and answer a handful of questions.

settings.question: How do we communicate day-to-day?
settings.answer: Email for async work, scheduled calls for anything that needs a conversation. Clients on the Full Advisory engagement have a direct line and priority response.

settings.question: What's included in quarterly meetings?
settings.answer: A review of the last quarter's numbers, a look at the next quarter's tax posture, and any strategic questions on the table — entity structure, compensation strategy, major purchases, retirement contributions.

settings.question: Can we change engagement tiers later?
settings.answer: Yes. Most clients start on Monthly and move to Full Advisory as the business grows. You can also step down if needs change — we don't lock anyone into a tier they've outgrown.

settings.text: We'll talk through your numbers and tell you — or whether you need one at all.
